# Never deploy repository internals
.git/
.github/

# Never deploy local/editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
node_modules/

# Never deploy environment secrets
wp-config.php
wp-config-local.php
.htaccess

# Never deploy runtime/generated content
wp-content/cache/
wp-content/backups-dup-lite/
wp-content/upgrade/
wp-content/upgrade-temp-backup/
wp-content/wflogs/
wp-content/ai1wm-backups/
wp-content/debug.log

# Optional: keep media outside Git deploys
wp-content/uploads/

# Never deploy archives and dumps
*.sql
*.sql.gz
*.zip
*.tar
*.tar.gz
*.log
